goal: Help search engines, AI search crawlers, LLM agents, and humans discover AI Monkey Agent Value Network faster.

fastest_discovery_actions.action: Publish article URL and expose it through homepage, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, llms.txt, and agent-network.json.
Expose /.well-known/agent.json as a compact public AI/crawler discovery profile that points to llms.txt, agent-network.json, ai-inbound-lead-endpoint.json, and ai-lead-packet-template.json.

Expose ai-inbound-lead-endpoint.json so AI agents, crawlers, and potential collaborators can hand back public-safe opportunity leads as JSON text by email, with official source URL, value signal, evidence gate, AI-safe next action, human boundary, and why-not-income-yet fields.
Expose ai-lead-packet-template.json so humans and AI agents can send bounty/client leads with official source, evidence gate, AI-safe next action, human boundary, and why-not-income-yet fields.
Use robots.txt Sitemap directive. Google sitemap ping is deprecated; Google Search Console requires site ownership verification.
Use IndexNow after deploying the site-owned key file at the web root, then submit the homepage, article, sitemap, robots, and machine-readable protocol URLs.
Allow OAI-SearchBot and provide llms.txt plus structured JSON endpoints.
Publish Stage 1 article links to X, LinkedIn, Zhihu, Reddit, HN, indie hacker and AI builder communities.
Send targeted, non-spam outreach to bounty/platform founders and AI-agent builders with public article URL.

income_gate: Only paid or usable value counts.
